General.Name: Tristate Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Tristate Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the garment manufacturing business in the People's Republic of China, the United Kingdom, Italy, Singapore, Canada, and internationally. The company operates in two segments, Garment Manufacturing and Brands Business. It offers garments under the C.P. Company, Cissonne, Nautica, and Spyder brands; athletic footwear and clothes under the Reebok brand; and uniforms under the Massimo Osti Studio brand. The company also engages in the branded product distribution, retail, and trading. In addition, it offers sales liaison, general administrative and supporting, nominee and secretarial, technical, and design and customer support services. Further, the company is involved in the trademark holding, e-commerce and garment trading, retail store operation, general trading and marketing, and intelligence system development activities. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong. Tristate Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Silver Tree Holdings Inc.
General.Address: 66-72 Lei Muk Road, Kwai Chung, Hong Kong
